title: Cobblemon - Missingno!
description: A fakemon that appears where you shouldn't be and can also learn any move via TM/HM!
body:
This datapack adds Missingno to cobblemon! A fakemon that appears where you shouldn't be and can also learn any move via TM/HM! 

(works best with tm integrations like Where are my TMs? until they add TMs officially.)
